response.step_by_step_log: Detected intro screen followed by two performances. For Song 1, extracted title '絶体忠誠♡なのら！'. Search query: '"絶体忠誠♡なのら！" Japanese and English lyrics'. For Song 2, extracted title 'ぐるぐる＠まわる＠まわルーナ'. Search query: '"ぐるぐる＠まわる＠まわルーナ" Japanese and English lyrics'. Both songs are performed by Himemori Luna.
response.global_summary: A two-song concert medley performed by virtual YouTuber Himemori Luna, featuring 'Zettai Chuusei Nanora!' and 'Guru Guru @ Mawaru @ Mawa Luna'.

scenes.description: Himemori Luna performs 'Zettai Chuusei Nanora!' on stage, with song credits displayed on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
お菓子の国のお姫様
